title: Weight management endocrine review

assessment.text: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.
assessment.rationale: The exact permission and measurement section supports interval change, functional impact, relevant negatives, patient goals, measured weight or BMI, and focused assessment without assigning an obesity category or target.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.17 — permission, measurements, and adult assessment

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact goals and progress section supports documented safety net and clinician-arranged follow-up without selecting an interval or intervention.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.

exact_section.heading: Behavioural intervention recommendations — goals, progress, feedback, and follow-up

referral.text: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.
referral.rationale: The exact context section supports associated comorbidity context, reviewed endocrine results, clinician-entered discussion, and patient questions without generating lifestyle, medicine, or referral advice.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.11.1–1.11.14 — results, context, intervention discussion, and referral

source_limitations: Permission, age, sex, ethnicity, height, weight, BMI, waist, trajectory, pregnancy, comorbidities, medicines, eating disorder, goals, intervention, targets, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
